DP.453.0002:
[0103,0000], long time, no see!\f
Oh? You look puzzled.
You’re wondering who I am.\f
I’m Professor Rowan’s assistant
and [0103,0001]’s father.\f
The professor asked that I upgrade
your Pokédex, you see.\f
So I’d chosen this spot on a hunch
that you’d pass through.\f
[0103,0000], may I have your
Pokédex for a moment?\f

DP.453.0004:
Let’s see... Was I supposed to put
in the software here...?\f
Ka-chunk.
Ka-chunk!\f
All done!
I’ve upgraded your Pokédex!\f
I should explain how it’s been
upgraded, shouldn’t I?\f
It can now display images of male
and female Pokémon.\f
OK, I’ll leave you to carry on with
your project for the professor...\f
...May I also ask you to keep an
eye on Team Galactic?\f
The professor is concerned about
what happened in Jubilife City...\f
It’s probably nothing to worry over!
I’ll be on my way now.\f
